label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's imagine I'm facing forward, which I'll consider as facing North. I'll start at position (0, 0). 1. Take 2 steps right: Since I'm facing North, right would be East. So I move from (0, 0) to (2, 0). 2. Take 4 steps right: Still facing North, right is East. So I move from (2, 0) to (6, 0). 3. Take 6 steps left: Facing North, left would be West. So I move from (6, 0) to (0, 0). After following these instructions, I end up back at the starting point (0, 0). So the answer would be "Yes." But wait, I should double-check the directions. When facing forward (which I assumed was North), right would be East and left would be West. So my calculations look correct. After moving 2 steps right (East), 4 steps right (East), and then 6 steps left (West), I end up back
